summary: The implementation covers all major requirements quite well. REQ-1 through REQ-9 are largely addressed: Internet Identity authentication, top bar, asset/timeframe selector, TradingView chart with fallback, simulated analysis card, Motoko backend with save/retrieve, history tab, footer, and dark theme. However, there is one notable concern: the Motoko backend uses non-stable in-memory storage (Map.empty rather than stable variables), which likely fails the 'data survives canister upgrades' AC. Additionally, minor concerns exist around the exact required image filename and stable storage.

missing_requirements.requirement: Data survives canister upgrades using stable storage
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo uses 'let analyses = Map.empty<Principal, List.List<AnalysisRecord>>()' as a regular (non-stable) variable. There is no 'stable var' declaration, no pre/postupgrade system hooks, and no use of stable data structures for persistence across canister upgrades.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'LIVE' badge indicator is shown in the TopBar next to the app name
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any live/online status indicator in the top bar. REQ-2 only specifies app name on left and logout button on right.

hallucinated_features.description: caffeine.ai attribution link is included in the Footer component
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies the footer must show only 'This is not financial advice. No profits are guaranteed.' with no mention of third-party attribution links.

hallucinated_features.description: Access control and authorization mixin system with permission checks (MixinAuthorization, AccessControl) is integrated into the Motoko actor
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies a single Motoko actor with principal-keyed stable storage for analysis history. No access control layer or admin/user permission system was requested.
